query:
SELECT 
  NOW() as agora_banco,
  CURDATE() as hoje_banco,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lead_history lh JOIN users u ON lh.corretorId = u.id WHERE (u.name LIKE '%Leticia%' OR u.name LIKE '%Letícia%') AND tipo IN ('ligacao', 'whatsapp')) as total_historico,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lead_history lh JOIN users u ON lh.corretorId = u.id WHERE (u.name LIKE '%Leticia%' OR u.name LIKE '%Letícia%') AND tipo = 'ligacao' AND DATE(lh.createdAt) = CURDATE()) as ligacoes_hoje,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lead_history lh JOIN users u ON lh.corretorId = u.id WHERE (u.name LIKE '%Leticia%' OR u.name LIKE '%Letícia%') AND tipo = 'whatsapp' AND DATE(lh.createdAt) = CURDATE()) as whatsapp_hoje;

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lead_history lh JOIN users u ON lh.corretorId = u.id WHERE (u.name LIKE '%Leticia%' OR u.name LIKE '%Letícia%') AND tipo IN ('ligacao', 'whatsapp')) as total_historico,
